flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at McLennan Community College fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (20.3% → 15.8%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at McLennan Community College fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.8k → $10.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at McLennan Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (61.3% → 69.5%).
